creator: jps@scxnet.de
text:
Hi!

I use a PC Engines ALIX-board (http://pcengines.ch/alix2c3.htm).
This Board is supported in geode.c (/src/sys/i386/i386/geode.c) rev1.11/HEAD but not in releng_7_2.
Is it possible to merge rev1.11 to releng_7_2?

Fix: 

download r1.11 from cvs by hand
How-To-Repeat: checkout releng_7_2-sources look at /src/sys/i386/i386/geode.c
